metadata.title: ClipProfit - Creator Campaign Marketplace
metadata.description: Connect casino businesses with social media creators for view-based ad campaigns.

signIn.title: Welcome back
signIn.passwordUpdated: Password updated. Sign in with your new password.
signIn.callbackFailed: We could not finish signing you in. Please try again.

forgot.title: Reset password
forgot.description: Enter your email and we'll send you a reset link.
forgot.success: Check your email - we sent a password reset link.

signUp.title: Create account
signUp.checkEmailBody: We sent a verification link to {email}. Click it to activate your account and get started.

email.subject: Confirm your ClipProfit account
email.title: Confirm your account
email.body: Click the button below to verify your email and activate your ClipProfit account.
email.footer: This link expires in 15 minutes. If you did not create a ClipProfit account, you can ignore this email.

confirm.title: Confirm your account
confirm.body: Click the button below to verify your email and activate your ClipProfit account.
confirm.invalidBody: This verification link is invalid or has expired.

reset.title: Set new password
reset.description: Choose a new password for your account.
reset.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 6 characters.

api.rateLimited: Please wait before requesting another verification email.
api.alreadyExists: An account with this email already exists.

page.panelTitle: Almost there. Let's set up your account.
page.panelDescription: Just one step before you can start browsing campaigns and tracking earnings.
page.title: Welcome to ClipProfit
page.description: Just a few quick questions to get you started.

form.sourceQuestion: Where did you hear about us?
form.nicheQuestion: What niche(s) do you create content for?
form.completeBody: Two more things unlock your first payout: connecting a social account and joining a campaign. Pick one to start.
form.skip: Skip for now - go to campaigns

legal.englishOnlyNotice: These legal documents are currently available in English only.

unauthorized.title: Access Denied
unauthorized.description: You don't have permission to view this page.

header.title: Settings
header.description: Manage your profile and account preferences

accounts.label: Accounts
accounts.noneDetail: Connect a social account to join campaigns.
accounts.connectedValue: {count, plural, one {# verified account} other {# verified accounts}}

language.title: Language
language.description: Choose the dashboard language for this browser. The setting is saved immediately.

profile.title: Profile
profile.emptyBio: No bio yet. Add one to tell others about yourself.

displayName.label: Display name
displayName.helper: The name that shows on your dashboard, profile, and leaderboards.

bio.label: Bio
bio.helper: A short line about the kind of clips you make. Up to 280 characters.

wallet.label: USDT wallet (TRC-20)
wallet.helper: Where your withdrawals will be sent by default. Starts with T.

danger.title: Danger zone
danger.deleteDescription: Permanently delete your account and all associated data.

page.title: Good to see you, {name}
page.description: Start with the one thing that needs your attention now.

drawerSection.title: Open only when needed
drawerSection.description: Payouts, campaigns, stats, and recent submissions are still here, but no longer stacked on the dashboard.

snapshot.title: Operating snapshot
snapshot.description: Compact account, campaign, and submission numbers.

submissions.title: Recent submissions
submissions.description: Latest clips moving through review, approval, and payout.

connect.title: Connect a social account to start earning
connect.description: We need a connected account to track your views and match clips to campaigns.

payment.title: Add a payment method before your next payout
payment.description: You have unpaid earnings, but we don't have a way to send them to you yet.

finishProfile.title: Finish your profile
finishProfile.detail: Campaign eligibility starts with a complete profile.

connectAccount.title: Connect a posting account
connectAccount.detail: Connect TikTok, Instagram, YouTube, or Facebook so tracking can work.

joinCampaign.title: Join a campaign
joinCampaign.detail: Pick a campaign that matches your platform and payout target.

checkPendingClips.title: Check pending clips
checkPendingClips.detail: Review status, fixes, and earnings from your submitted clips.

reviewPayoutStatus.title: Review payout status
reviewPayoutStatus.detail: Approved earnings are ready to track in Payments.

submitAnotherClip.title: Submit another clip
submitAnotherClip.detail: Open a joined campaign and send the next post URL.

payoutSummary.title: Payout summary
payoutSummary.description: Estimated earnings become final after review and payout processing.

activeCampaigns.title: Active campaigns
activeCampaigns.description: Campaigns you have joined or started. Open one to submit the next clip.
activeCampaigns.emptyDescription: Browse the marketplace and join a campaign that matches your connected accounts.

operatingSnapshot.title: Operating snapshot
operatingSnapshot.description: The numbers stay compact so the next action remains obvious.

recentSubmissions.title: Recent submissions
recentSubmissions.description: Latest clips moving through review, approval, and payout.

liveEarnings.title: Live Earnings
liveEarnings.activeClips: {count, plural, one {# active clip} other {# active clips}}
liveEarnings.estimatedHelp: Views x CPV across approved, unsettled clips. Updates as views come in.
liveEarnings.error: Could not refresh live earnings - retrying in 60s.

score.title: Performance Score
score.emptyBody: Your score will appear after a few approved submissions.
score.emptyDetail: We grade you on approval rate, view performance vs. campaign benchmarks, trust, on-time delivery, and audience fit.

activation.title: Get started
activation.subtitle: Finish these steps to unlock your first payout.

profile.label: Complete your profile
profile.description: Add a display name so we can address you.

account.label: Connect a social account
account.description: Connected accounts unlock campaigns and let us track your views.

clip.label: Submit your first clip
clip.description: Pick a campaign you've joined and submit a clip URL.

payment.label: Add a payment method
payment.description: Required before your first payout - you can do this later.

approval.label: Get your first approved clip
approval.description: Once a clip is reviewed and approved, you start earning per verified view.

header.title: Command Center
header.description: Start here for the next operator move, then open details only when you need them.

actionQueue.title: Daily Action Queue
actionQueue.description: Sorted by operational urgency, not by menu order.

coreNumbers.title: Core numbers
coreNumbers.description: The first strip stays small; deeper reporting opens from Reports.

drillIns.title: Drill-ins
drillIns.description: Open the specific area when the daily queue points there.

followUps.title: {count, plural, one {Follow up with # brand lead} other {Follow up with # brand leads}}
followUps.detail: Lead follow-ups are due now. Move the lead, book the call, or keep it warm.

onboarding.title: {count, plural, one {# onboarding checklist blocked} other {# onboarding checklists blocked}}
onboarding.detail: Contract, payment, brief, assets, audience, and assigned clippers must be complete before production.

overdue.title: {count, plural, one {# overdue production assignment} other {# overdue production assignments}}
overdue.detail: Production starts at assigned clip, not after the creator submits. Clear overdue work first.

review.title: {count, plural, one {Review # clip} other {Review # clips}}
review.detail: {missingLogo, plural, one {# missing-logo item} other {# missing-logo items}}, {revisionAssignments, plural, one {# revision assignment} other {# revision assignments}}.

payout.title: Close the payout loop
payout.detail: {payoutRuns, plural, one {# payout run} other {# payout runs}} in progress, {amount} owed from legacy payouts.

guide.title: {count, plural, one {# guide needs review} other {# guides need review}}
guide.detail: Keep sales, onboarding, recruitment, production, clip review, payouts, and reporting guides current.

risk.title: {count, plural, one {Resolve # open risk signal} other {Resolve # open risk signals}}
risk.detail: {critical} critical, {tokenBroken} token-related. These feed delivery risk.

empty.title: No urgent blockers
empty.detail: Use the pipeline strip and weekly numbers to decide the next sales, production, or payout move.

activeClippers.label: Active clippers
activeClippers.detail: {count, plural, one {# clip due or in progress} other {# clips due or in progress}}

estimatedProfit.label: Estimated profit
estimatedProfit.detail: Booked minus creator cost and open payouts

risk.label: Risk
risk.detail: {count, plural, one {# broken token signal} other {# broken token signals}}

drillIns.noRisk: No campaign pace risks in the next 7 days.

weeklyClose.title: Weekly close
weeklyClose.detail: Confirm approved clips, finalize payout runs, then log guide updates before the next reporting cycle.

commandCenter.name: Command Center
commandCenter.detail: Today first view of work, money, and risk

leads.name: Leads
leads.detail: Lead pipeline, follow-ups, owner, and value

brandOnboarding.name: Brand Onboarding
brandOnboarding.detail: Contract, payment, brief, assets, and assigned clippers

clipperDatabase.name: Clipper Database
clipperDatabase.detail: Creator profiles, operations, capacity, and assigned brands

contentProduction.name: Content Production
contentProduction.detail: Assignments, due dates, revisions, and submissions

clipReview.name: Clip Review
clipReview.detail: Scorecards, logo review, approvals, and signals

pricing.name: Pricing
pricing.detail: Reusable package templates for brand and campaign planning

documents.name: Documents
documents.detail: Contracts, briefs, owners, links, and renewal dates

guides.name: Guides
guides.detail: Searchable operating guides with review owners

weeklyNumbers.name: Weekly Numbers
weeklyNumbers.detail: Saved weekly review snapshots from live data
